title: anthemis triumfetti subsp. aligulata
intro: Anthemis triumfetti subsp. aligulata, also known as a subspecies of the Anthemis triumfetta plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
